clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the broad dimension of emotional reactivity, valence, and autonomic arousal typically mediated by the integrated limbic and anterior salience systems.
These terms converge on the computation of incentive salience, reward processing, and reinforcement-based decision-making fundamentally supported by mesocorticolimbic and striatal circuitry.

This dimension captures internally constructed models of the self and others, mapping directly onto the default mode network's role in processing abstract interpersonal and self-referential narratives.
